title: Harou's Leashed Fences
description: Connect fences together with a lead!
body:
## Harou's Leashed Fences
![Roap Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ef7ced3071a8b4e1ab79f13c15082ede3a6be2.png)

### Description
A Minecraft Fabric mod that allows you to leash fences together! No more structural chickens needed.

### Features
- Fence-to-Fence Leashing: Connect fences together using leads
- Works alongside vanilla leashing mechanics (you can still leash mobs to fences)
- Each knot can have multiple connections to other knots
- Uses a proper custom leashing implementation, not hacky invisible entities etc.

### How to Use
1. **Right-click the first fence with a lead**
    - This will create a leash knot at the fence
    - The knot will attach to you (you'll see a lead connecting from your hand to the fence)
    - Works even if there's no existing knot at the fence
2. **Right-click the second fence with the lead still in hand**
    - This will create a knot at the second fence
    - The two fences will now be connected with a visible lead
3. **To disconnect:**
    - Right-click **without** a lead in hand either knot to pick up one end of the connection
    - Right-click the other knot to drop the lead
    - Alternatively, you can also ctrl+click a fence to drop all of its fence-to-fence connections

### Normal Mob Leashing Still Works
- You can have mobs leashed to a fence AND fence-to-fence connections at the same time
- The mod prioritizes mob leashing over fence-to-fence connections
  - E.g. interacting with a knot that holds both mobs and other knots will pick up only the mobs

### More mods
Do you like this mod? Try some other mods I made, like:
- [Phantoms in the End](https://modrinth.com/mod/phantoms-in-the-end)
- [Small Netherite Beacons](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-netherite-beacons) 
- [Harou's Netherite Shulkers ](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-netherite-shulkers)
